summary: Human Gate for manual node battle decision
acceptance_criteria: The task records M5 evidence relevant to whether manual node battle is worth independent development, but does not implement or approve manual battle by itself.
A human explicitly decides one of: defer manual node battle, authorize a future bounded research/spike task, or authorize a future implementation task with separate scope and review.

The decision preserves automatic battle/siege determinism and does not introduce tactical battle UI, 3D battle, complex naval battle, server/multiplayer, telemetry, arbitrary-code mods, release, branding, or commercial decisions.
If no explicit human decision is present, status remains BLOCKED or DRAFT and autonomous continuation must not create manual battle implementation tasks.
required_tests: Manual Human Gate evidence includes explicit approval/deferral text, date, actor, and selected decision path.
notes: This is a Human Gate placeholder and must not become READY through autonomous selection alone.
Do not implement manual node battle, tactical battle UI, 3D battle, or battle content in this task.
If humans authorize follow-up work, create a new bounded task/ADR as appropriate; do not mutate this decision task into implementation.
Product owner decision: DEFER_MANUAL_NODE_BATTLE. Do not create manual node battle implementation or blocking spike/research tasks for the 1.0 mainline.

Product owner decision text explicitly requires recording the decision and fixing audit ledger/status issues; docs/28-manual-node-battle-decision.md and project/audits/STATUS-AUDIT-20260627.md are included as process-document evidence paths for this decision task.
